category_uid: Integer: Required: Numeric category UID as defined by OCSF 6 = Application Activity.
category_name: String: Optional: Human-readable name of the category corresponding to category_uid.
activity_id: Integer: Required: Identifier representing the source-code access activity being recorded.(0: Unknown, 1: Repository Access, 2: Repository Clone, 3: Repository Pull, 4: Repository Push, 5: Pull Request Access, 6: Pull Request Review, 7: Pull Request Merge, 8: Branch Access, 9: Branch Protection Change, 10: Source Code Download, 11: Source Code View, 12: Permission Change, 13: Secret Access, 14: Pipeline Trigger, 99: Other)
activity_name: String: Optional: Human-readable name of the activity associated with activity_id.
type_uid: Integer: Optional: OCSF type identifier combining class, activity, and category when available.
severity_id: Integer: Optional: Numeric severity level indicating the risk associated with the event.
status: String: Optional: Human-readable result of the source code access event e.g. Success, Failure, Denied.
status_id: Integer: Optional: Normalized numeric identifier representing the event status. 0 Unknown, 1 Success, 2 Failure, 3 Denied, 99 Other.
status_detail: String: Optional: Additional explanation describing the status or control decision.
status_code: String: Optional: Platform-generated response or error code useful for troubleshooting.
message: String: Optional: Additional contextual or debug information related to the source code access event.
time: String: Required: Time the source code access event occurred in ISO 8601 format.
start_time: String: Optional: Time when the access session or request started in ISO 8601 format.
end_time: String: Optional: Time when the access session or request ended in ISO 8601 format.
duration: Integer: Optional: Duration of the activity in milliseconds when start and end times are known.

user.name: String: Required: Unique identifier or username of the account associated with the source code access event.
user.uid: String: Required: Unique identifier of the user in the source system.
user.type: String: Optional: Type of identity performing the action e.g. Human, Service Account, Bot, Contractor. Use a fixed value if known.

user.name: String: Optional: Name of the acting user when different from the affected user.
user.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of the acting user in the source system.
user.type: String: Optional: Role or privilege context of the acting identity e.g. Admin, Developer, Reviewer, CI Service. Use a fixed value if known.

process.name: String: Optional: Name of the process, client, agent, or automation tool that executed the request e.g. git, GitHub Actions runner, Jenkins agent.
process.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of the process, job, or automation instance if available.

src_endpoint.hostname: String: Optional: Hostname of the device or workload from which the request originated.
src_endpoint.ip: String: Optional: Source IP address initiating the request.
src_endpoint.type: String: Optional: Type of endpoint e.g. Laptop, Workstation, Build Server, Container, Mobile. Use a fixed value if known.

org.name: String: Required: Name of the organization, tenant, or business unit associated with the repository or source code platform.
org.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of the organization or tenant.

cloud.provider: String: Optional: Cloud provider or hosting platform if applicable e.g. GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, AWS CodeCommit.

account.uid: String: Optional: Account, subscription, or tenant identifier in the hosting environment.
account.name: String: Optional: Human-readable account or tenant name in the hosting environment.

app_name: String: Optional: Name of the application, SCM, or developer platform where the event occurred.

repository.name: String: Required: Repository, project, or codebase name accessed by the user or process.
repository.uid: String: Optional: Unique repository identifier in the source platform.
repository.path: String: Optional: Full repository path or namespace e.g. org/project/service-api.
repository.branch: String: Optional: Branch name involved in the activity.
repository.visibility: String: Optional: Repository visibility e.g. Public, Internal, Private.

file.name: String: Optional: Name of the source file, artifact, or manifest involved in the event.
file.path: String: Optional: Full relative or absolute path to the source file or directory involved in the event.
file.type: String: Optional: File type or extension e.g. py, js, java, yml, secrets, config.
file.size: Integer: Optional: File size in bytes when available.

code_request.request_type: String: Optional: Type of access request or code operation e.g. clone, pull, fetch, checkout, merge, review, download, read.
code_request.request_id: String: Optional: Platform request identifier such as pull request ID, merge request ID, or API request ID.
code_request.target_ref: String: Optional: Target branch, tag, or commit reference requested.
code_request.source_ref: String: Optional: Source branch, fork, or commit reference involved in the request.
code_request.approval_state: String: Optional: Approval state of the request e.g. Pending, Approved, Rejected, Merged.
code_request.transport: String: Optional: Protocol or method used to access the code e.g. HTTPS, SSH, Web UI, API, Agent.
code_request.is_privileged: Boolean: Optional: True when the request involves privileged access, protected branches, production repositories, or restricted code paths.
code_request.is_sensitive: Boolean: Optional: True when the request involves highly sensitive code, secrets, security tooling, or regulated data handling logic.

access_control.permission: String: Optional: Effective permission used for the action e.g. Read, Write, Admin, Maintainer, Reviewer.
access_control.permission_change: String: Optional: Description of permission change when the event updates source code access rights.
access_control.decision: String: Optional: Result of policy evaluation e.g. Allowed, Denied, Blocked, Requires Approval.
access_control.reason: String: Optional: Business or technical reason for the access decision.
access_control.reviewer: String: Optional: User, team, or approver validating access or pull request workflow.
access_control.is_approved_exception: Boolean: Optional: True when access was granted under a documented exception.

auth_protocol: String: Optional: Authentication or authorization protocol used to access the platform e.g. OAuth, PAT, SSH Key, SAML, OIDC.

session.uid: String: Optional: Session or connection identifier associated with the source code access event.
session.is_mfa: Boolean: Optional: True if MFA was used during the session, False if not used or not verified.
session.issuer: String: Optional: Identity provider or session issuer associated with the authentication context.

unmapped.tags: Array: Optional: List of normalized labels relevant to the event e.g. source_code_access, pull_request, protected_branch, secret_access.
unmapped.observables: Array: Optional: Additional observables relevant to the event such as commit hashes, branch refs, ticket IDs, or change request numbers.
unmapped.notes: String: Optional: Free-text analyst or workflow note explaining control relevance or investigation context.

metadata.version: String: Required: OCSF schema version e.g. 1.0.0.
metadata.uid: String: Optional: Original event UID in the source system. If no relevant ID exists keep blank.
metadata.logged_time: String: Optional: Time the event was logged in ISO 8601 format.

product.name: String: Required: Name of the platform this data came from e.g. GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps. Write the name directly, not a variable.
product.vendor_name: String: Optional: Name of the vendor that owns the platform.

profiles: String: Optional: List of normalization profiles or control mappings relevant to this record e.g. ISO27001_A.8.4, Secure_SDLC, IAM.

custom_attributes.control_id: String: Optional: Control identifier associated with the event. Recommended value: ISO27001:2022-A.8.4.
custom_attributes.control_name: String: Optional: Control title associated with the event. Recommended value: Access to Source Code.
custom_attributes.control_objective: String: Optional: Short statement describing the security objective, such as restricting unauthorized viewing, copying, modification, or transfer of source code.
custom_attributes.repository_owner: String: Optional: Team, squad, or business owner responsible for the repository.
custom_attributes.data_classification: String: Optional: Classification of the codebase or file e.g. Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted.
custom_attributes.change_ticket: String: Optional: Related change request, approval, or service ticket identifier.
custom_attributes.commit_hash: String: Optional: Commit SHA associated with the activity if available.
custom_attributes.merge_commit_hash: String: Optional: Merge commit SHA when the event relates to a completed merge.
custom_attributes.pr_title: String: Optional: Title of the pull or merge request when applicable.
custom_attributes.justification: String: Optional: Business justification provided for privileged or exceptional source code access.
custom_attributes.comments: Array: Optional: Array of objects with fields author, timestamp, text representing analyst comments or review notes.
custom_attributes.tlp: Integer: Optional: Traffic Light Protocol classification. Default: 2.
custom_attributes.custom_fields: Object: Optional: Arbitrary key-value pairs for vendor-specific or workflow-specific fields.
custom_attributes.assignee: String: Optional: Email or identifier of the analyst, reviewer, or system responsible for this event.
